title: The Happiest Millionaire
writer: Kyle Crichton, Cordelia Drexel Biddle, AJ Carothers
actors: Fred MacMurray, Tommy Steele, Greer Garson
plot: Clever yet hapless new butler John Lawless manages a Philadelphia household for quirky and joyful millionaire Anthony Drexel Biddle, his unflappable wife, Cordelia, and their spitfire daughter, Cordy.
